name: spec-forge
description: Spec → plan → execute pipeline for coding agents. Turns requirements into implementable, RFC 2119-normative specifications (full-spec / quick-spec), then into bite-sized TDD implementation plans (writing-plans) and runs them with review checkpoints (executing-plans). Ships session-ledger: a cross-session in-progress change ledger (MCP + hooks) that de-confuses multiple Claude Code sessions sharing one working directory.
